notes: Empty state was already implemented in tools-canvas-view.tsx (lines 479-506) from a prior iteration. The implementation fully satisfies all acceptance criteria: centered overlay when tools.length === 0 && toolSections.length === 0, heading 'No tools yet' with body guiding user to add tools and inline Add buttons, disappears when tools/sections are added, uses var(--text-secondary)/var(--text-tertiary) (dark theme equivalents of text-white/55 and text-white/30), and TypeScript compiles with zero errors. No changes required.
